What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: Individuals wearing blue or purple medical scrub tops stand at a light-colored countertop. They use both hands to pull crinkled white plastic outer bags off cylindrical containers. Two clear plastic bottles with white caps sit on the table surface in the background behind the main action. Black handled scissors lie on the left side of the workspace. Chinese text overlays instruct to remove the outer packaging bag first.
